title: NiftyCarts x Regions Unexplored
body:
# [NiftyCarts](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts) x [RegionsUnexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)

This is a very simple datapack that adds the blocks from Regions Unexplored to the tags of NiftyCarts which makes it possible to break grasses and flowers from Regions Unexplored breakable by Plow, Reaper, and so on.
